verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Make me know Your presence Lord, the King of glory here You know each thought and action, hope, anxiety and fear How can I hide from Thee? Can darkness hide iniquity Oh, how can I unfaithful be, when You are very near to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When God is near, all the world seems far away When God is near, every fear is set aside When God is near, how can I stray, how can I falter I'll stay upon the altar, I know my God is near

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Make me know Your presence Lord, when I feel so alone You know each trial and testing pain, the hurt that is unknown Oh, why can I not see, Your hand so firmly guiding me? Oh, how can I untrusting be, when You are very near to me?
